sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-09-15');
SELECT id, date_trunc('month', event_date) AS truncated_date FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = date_trunc('year', event_date) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, date_trunc('week', event_date) AS week_start FROM test_dates;
